problem.summary: Compute LayerNorm and RMSNorm backward gradients with explicit row reductions and parameter-gradient reductions, using PyTorch, Transformer Engine, and Triton as library/framework baselines.
constraints: Template-only ROCm parity port; CUDA-origin timing records were not copied and no ROCm profiler-counter evidence is claimed
Support LayerNorm and RMSNorm contracts separately
Record whether saved statistics come from forward or are recomputed
Accumulate dgamma/dbeta in fp32 and document reduction strategy

verification.method: The HIP harness compares dx, dgamma, and dbeta against a deterministic CPU reference using deterministic inputs and saved-statistic reuse. A PyTorch eager RMSNorm backward timing-only baseline is attached for gfx1201; custom HIP and Triton comparisons remain pending.

curation.notes: ROCm parity port from CUDA task `normalization-backward`. A PyTorch eager RMSNorm backward timing-only baseline was captured on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201. Custom HIP and Triton comparisons plus profiler-counter evidence remain pending.
